name: Route 2 / First Thai-Lao Friendship Bridge gateway
capture_notes: Highest current seed AADT point is Route 2 Nam Suai - Friendship Bridge at 33,247 AADT with high heavy-vehicle share. Best corridor for cross-border and intercity DC charging.

name: Nong Khai city / Mekong riverfront core
capture_notes: City, riverfront, tourism, hotel, government, restaurant, and rail/bus demand. More destination-oriented than high-throughput highway charging.

name: Route 243 border checkpoint axis
capture_notes: Route 243 to the Thai-Lao Friendship Bridge border checkpoint has 23,177 AADT in seed data. Strong if site has convenient pre-border/post-border access.

name: Route 212 east Mekong corridor / Nong Khai - Pak Suai
capture_notes: Route 212 east of Nong Khai has 14,537 AADT and supports Mekong-side district flow. Demand depends on local POIs and charger coverage.

name: Tha Bo / Route 211 Mekong west corridor
capture_notes: Route 211/Tha Bo corridor has moderate district/tourism flow. Better for coverage and destination stopovers than pure utilization.

name: Phon Phisai / Route 212 east district corridor
capture_notes: District population and Mekong tourism demand; likely lower frequency and more seasonal.

name: Sangkhom Mekong tourism axis
capture_notes: Scenic Mekong tourism route with low AADT in current seed data. Consider for tourism/coverage goals rather than high base utilization.
